forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 1d76db
+description: Upgrade workspace from agent-client-protocol 0.10.4 to 0.11.1 (latest stable on crates.io). Covers agent-client-protocol-extras, claude-agent, llama-agent, acp-conformance, swissarmyhammer-agent, swissarmyhammer-tools, avp-common. Excludes opting into the `unstable` feature unless a follow-up task chooses to.
+name: ACP 0.10 → 0.11 upgrade
